title: wolfhsm crypto: RSA and ML-DSA
description: rsa.rs: RsaKey{id:KeyId,bits:u32} with generate(bits,e), load(label,bits), commit, evict, public_key_der, function(rsa_type,in_buf)->Vec<u8> (raw op via wolfhsm_rsa_sign/verify shims), get_size. mldsa.rs (feature=mldsa): MlDsaKey{id:KeyId,level:u8} (level 44/65/87) with generate(level), load(label,level), commit, evict, sign(msg)->Vec<u8>, verify(msg,sig), check_private_key. Both use shims from wolfhsm-sys/shims.c.
